title: Arctic Sea Ice Extent: September 1, 2022
summary: September 1, 2022: Over the past week, the sea ice has now decreased by a lower rate from last week of 6.67% , from the level on 08/25/2022 of 5.385 M km 2 to 5.026 M km 2 for this week. We are still a few weeks out from bottoming out for the year and at this point we continue towards at least the 2...

title: Polar powers: the future of Arctic security
summary: Malte Humpert contributes to a podcast about polar powers and Arctic security. The post Polar powers: the future of Arctic security appeared first on The Arctic Institute - Center for Circumpolar Security Studies .
